filesModified.purpose: Replaced className="p-4" with style={{ padding: "16px" }} on the popover wrapper div so padding applies inside Gutenberg interface-level components where Tailwind classes are unavailable

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs)

syncStatus.notes: TSX-only change — the Popover is editor-only with no PHP counterpart. Pre-existing false-positive warning on root wrapper mismatch is the standard pattern for all blocks in this theme.

fixesApplied.change: Popover wrapper div: className="p-4" → style={{ padding: "16px" }} (merged into existing style prop with minWidth)
